CustomField.description: SLDS icon API name displayed in the stage column header. Format: category:name (e.g., standard:lead, utility:call, utility:success). See https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the full icon catalog.
CustomField.helpText: SLDS icon name (category:name). Example: standard:lead, utility:call, utility:success
CustomField.label: Icon
